category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes lsdvd as a console application that displays DVD content information.
source_facts.description: Read the content info of a DVD.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project and source code pages use lsdvd.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge README documents output formats, help, and build-from-git instructions.
Official SourceForge project page is referenced by the upstream README for documentation and project activity.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is the SourceForge Git URL, and the official SourceForge Source Code page exposes Git source control.
tags_sources: Official README documents DVD info output in human-readable, JSON, Perl, Python, Ruby, and XML formats.
source_facts.description identifies DVD content information reading.
